title: composition_report.v1
description: ForgeTileset composition diagnostic report. Documents what was composed, coverage metrics, and any warnings.

recipeId.description: Recipe identifier that produced this report.

total.description: Total cases expected for this pair's mask model.

missing.description: Case IDs that were expected but not generated.

materialCount.description: Number of materials in the recipe.

tileCount.description: Total tiles in the output atlas (variants + transitions + overlays).

effectOverlayTiles.description: Number of effect overlay tiles generated.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings encountered during composition (palette mismatches, seamless checks, etc.).
